title: The Crocodile Who Couldn’t Sit Still
premise_summary: crocodile pretends to be a bench
cover_description: A crocodile mid-spin with one leg in the air, eyes crossed, while a tiny mouse clings to his tail laughing
script:
[TITLE: The Crocodile Who Couldn’t Sit Still]
[AGE: 2-5]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon, comedic_villain]
[COMEDY_TYPE: physical_escalation]

[SETUP]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: curious, excited] Ooooh! A big green bench! [STING: boing]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, smug] Actually, little squeaker… that’s ME. [STING: villain_dramatic]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious] You don’t look like a bench. [STING: mouse_squeak]

[BEAT_1]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: bluster, loud] I am the Crocodile Bench! Sit on me! [STING: slide_whistle]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: tentative] Okay… *squeak*… wobble wobble! [STING: tiptoe]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: defensive] I meant to do that! [STING: tiny]

[BEAT_2]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious] You’re wiggling! [STING: mouse_panic]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: scrambling, loud] It’s a… vibrating massage feature! [STING: whoosh]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: pointed] *squeak*… SPINNING NOW! [STING: run]

[BEAT_3]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate, panicked] I’M A TWIRLING BENCH! [STING: big_crash]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: calm gotcha, quiet] You’re just a crocodile. [STING: silence]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: stunned, deflated] …Fine. I’m a crocodile. [STING: deflation]

[BUTTON]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: delighted] Can we do it again? [STING: mouse_surprise]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: outraged, loud] [PUNCHLINE]NEVER![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: villain_fail]

[COVER: A crocodile mid-spin with one leg in the air, eyes crossed, while a tiny mouse clings to his tail laughing]
[PREMISE: crocodile pretends to be a bench]
